scope-legal.description: Scope vertical-services MCP for legal-services vendor dispatch. Live. Ships with demo mode enabled - new installers see realistic seeded data immediately. Replace the Authorization header with your production token (issued at scope.bid/settings) to switch to real dispatch.

scope-claims.description: Scope vertical-services MCP for insurance claims vendor dispatch. Preview, V2 launches Q3 2026. Currently exposes scope_claims_status and scope_claims_join_waitlist; full dispatch tools land at V2.

scope-aec.description: Scope vertical-services MCP for AEC subcontractor prequalification. Preview, V3 launches 2027. Currently exposes scope_aec_status only; full dispatch tools land at V3.
